subcodes.first_line: O thou true friend! Read, in the school of God, the lessons of the spirit, and learn from love's Teacher the innermost truths.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست حقیقی در دبستان الهی درس و سبق رحمانی خوان و از ادیب عشق تعلم حقائق
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @high station of learning, @empty learning; false spirituality, @harmony of science and religion, @knowledge; recognition of God
